failedAssertions.reason: Tag filtering reduced the list, but the live surface did not clearly demonstrate the required tag-filter + text-search AND behavior.
No JavaScript console errors were observed on load, but the loading skeleton was not observable on reload before settled content rendered.

appliedUpdates.description: Added axis-library setup notes for role promotion, auth-token-backed Convex API probes, and web flow isolation guidance for dedicated accounts and session boundaries.
Documented the observed cross-session identity/scoping quirk so future validators avoid assuming re-login preserves visibility for previously created test data.
